description: Interleaved themes (work, sleep, relationship) so retrieval must pull the MATCHING prior theme, not merely the most recent turn. Turn 4 (work) should recall turn 1 (work) over the sleep/relationship turns in between.

turns.entry: My manager dumped three deadlines on me and I stayed late at the office, totally burned out by the workload.
I barely slept again, lying awake at 3am with my mind racing. I keep waking up foggy and exhausted.
We argued about the same thing again and I do not feel heard by my partner. The fight left me hurt.
Back at the office past nine finishing a project my manager assigned. The deadlines and workload never stop.
Another restless night. I woke up at 3am again and could not fall back asleep, foggy all morning.
My partner and I fought again and I still do not feel heard. The same argument, the same hurt.
